title: eryngium tuberosum
intro: Eryngium tuberosum, also known as the Qī wěi jiǎo or Sea Holly, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. This perennial plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Eryngium tuberosum include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. Eryngium tuberosum can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
